title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
